title: state-conventions.md schema cross-reference inconsistency
description: steps field updated to object[] but work-harness.md and depth-escalation.md still describe/show string[] format

title: step_status documented but unused — deprecation needed
description: step_status field in schema is redundant now that steps is object[]; hooks ignore it; agents may create both, causing divergence risk

title: $HOME in sed not escaped for regex-special chars
description: install.sh line 144 interpolates $HOME into sed; if HOME contains & or \, output is garbled. Use parameter expansion instead.

title: _hcf_reported_blocker cross-call state undocumented
description: Deduplication variable relies on POSIX function scope sharing but has no header comment explaining the contract

title: harness-improvements.md says 10 areas but lists 11 components
description: What section says '10 areas' but Components table has C1-C11 (11 entries)

title: state-conventions.md schema cross-reference inconsistency
description: Fixed: updated work-harness.md State Management to show object[] steps, updated depth-escalation.md examples to use object-array format
resolution: Updated work-harness.md and depth-escalation.md to use object-array steps format

title: step_status documented but unused — deprecation needed
description: Fixed: marked step_status as DEPRECATED in state-conventions.md
resolution: Marked step_status as DEPRECATED with note to use steps[].status instead

title: $HOME in sed not escaped for regex-special chars
description: Fixed: replaced sed with POSIX parameter expansion
resolution: Replaced sed s|$HOME|~| with parameter expansion ${_hcf_check#$HOME}

title: _hcf_reported_blocker cross-call state undocumented
description: Fixed: added comment to function header

title: harness-improvements.md says 10 areas but lists 11 components
resolution: Updated text to match actual component count
